name: AMD
rationale: AMD is the only remaining candidate that cleanly passes the hard momentum gate after avoiding a TSLA re-entry on the same day it was just closed. Market data is strong enough to justify a starter position: 1M momentum is +10.94% and 3M momentum is +133.56%, with drawdown only -10.93%; the high daily volatility (4.79%) argues for a modest size. The catalyst is supportive but not euphoric: Reuters r
